scripts.e2e: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/portfolio.spec.ts tests/e2e/accessibility.spec.ts tests/e2e/liquid-glass.spec.ts tests/e2e/model-interaction.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.asset:inspect: npm run asset:audit && gltf-transform inspect public/models/DNA/dna.glb
scripts.test:visual: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/visual.spec.ts tests/e2e/liquid-glass.visual.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:glass: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/liquid-glass.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:glass:visual: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/liquid-glass.visual.spec.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:glass:visual:update: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/liquid-glass.visual.spec.ts --workers=1 --update-snapshots
scripts.quality: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run unit && npm run coverage && npm run knip && npm run asset:inspect && npm run bundle
scripts.test:visual:update: npm run build && playwright test tests/e2e/visual.spec.ts tests/e2e/liquid-glass.visual.spec.ts --workers=1 --update-snapshots
